title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: irqbalance bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for irqbalance is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The irqbalance packages provide a daemon that evenly distributes the interrupt request (IRQ) load across multiple CPUs for enhanced performance.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): On a Single Node OpenShift with Telco DU configuration irqbalance.service fails with buffer overflow detected [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-91476)

full_text:
An update for irqbalance is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The irqbalance packages provide a daemon that evenly distributes the interrupt request (IRQ) load across multiple CPUs for enhanced performance.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): On a Single Node OpenShift with Telco DU configuration irqbalance.service fails with buffer overflow detected [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-91476)
